title: Fetch and post BOM radar images in chat
description:
When a user asks for a radar image (e.g. "grab the radar for Sydney from BOM"), the bot should be able to:

1. Fetch the current radar image from BOM (e.g. the Sydney/Terrey Hills radar)
2. Send it as an image attachment in the Signal group chat

This would require:
- A way to download radar images from BOM (likely fetching a known URL pattern for each radar station)
- Support for sending image attachments via the Signal client (signal-cli supports this)
- Possibly a new MCP tool like `get_radar_image` on the weather server, or a separate capability
acceptanceCriteria: Bot can fetch current BOM radar images given a location/station
Bot can send radar images as image attachments in Signal group chat
Works with predictable BOM radar URL patterns
New MCP tool for radar image fetching
